currency_note: Pricing on Patreon is set in HKD. The values below reflect the current Patreon configuration.

tiers.short_desc_en: Support the development of honest, provenance-aware AI reasoning. Wisdom before intelligence.
tiers.short_desc_zh: 支持誠實且具來源意識的 AI 推理開發。智慧先於智能。
benefits_en: Your name publicly listed in SPONSORS.md
The satisfaction of funding real source-discipline research
benefits_zh: 在版本發行說明中獲得鳴謝
支持真實來源紀律研究的滿足感

tiers.short_desc_en: Early access + deeper insight into the work behind the gate.
tiers.short_desc_zh: 搶先體驗 + 深入了解閘門背後的工作。
benefits_en: Early access to new tools, scripts and benchmark previews
Private Patreon posts with deeper technical notes
Priority consideration for feedback on new features
benefits_zh: 包含智慧種子所有權益
搶先體驗新工具、腳本及基準測試預覽
Patreon 私人貼文，深入技術筆記
新功能回饋享有優先考慮

tiers.short_desc_en: Help decide the direction of future domains and expansions.
tiers.short_desc_zh: 協助決定未來領域與擴展的方向。
benefits_en: Quarterly direction survey — help choose which domains to expand next
Name mentioned in relevant technical updates and posts
Occasional private notes on verification work
benefits_zh: 季度方向調查 — 協助選擇下一個擴展的領域
在相關技術更新與貼文中提及姓名
偶爾獲得驗證工作的私人筆記

tiers.short_desc_en: Small-group involvement and direct voice in the project.
tiers.short_desc_zh: 小組參與及在項目中擁有直接發聲機會。
benefits_en: Invitation to small quarterly live discussion / office hours
Stronger voice on roadmap and domain priorities
Public credit in major releases and documentation
benefits_zh: 獲邀參與季度小型線上討論 / 辦公時間
對路線圖及領域優先順序擁有更強影響力
在主要版本及文件中獲得公開致謝
